lines.speaker: [18lb/22lb] Shot Put Referee
lines.text: Well done. You threw the shot [1-14] yards!

sections.title: When attempting to pick up a shot the player failed to throw

lines.speaker: [18lb/22lb] Shot Put Referee
lines.text: Hey! You can't take that, it's guild property. Take one from the pile.

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Greetings [Madam/Sir].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Shot Put area.

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Of course [Madam/Sir]. There are two different weights of shot...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shot?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Yes [Madam/Sir]. Shot. The iron spheres that are propelled by the chemical energy stored in your body.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The... what?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Your strength [Madam/Sir]. The stronger you are, the further you can throw the shot, but there are other factors of course, like your technique.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that then?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: The style of the shot [Madam/Sir].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Iron has style??

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: [Madam/Sir], the style in which you throw the shot, not the style of the iron.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh! You mean the spinny round thing or the chuck it straight?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Crudely put [Madam/Sir], but yes. Some are more difficult than others. Experiment and see which you prefer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the help!

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: You are welcome [Madam/Sir].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Of course! Here you go, you've earned [X] tokens!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: You don't have space to carry them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Tips [Madam/Sir]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, like how can I do better than everyone else.

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: [Madam/Sir] may find that a fine powder applied to the hands may give one an advantage when putting the shot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean if I grind something up and put dust on my hands I'll chuck the ball further?

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Yes [Madam/Sir].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: You are welcome [Madam/Sir].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Good luck [Madam/Sir].

sections.title: When the shot hits the ref

lines.speaker: Ref
lines.text: Oi! Watch where you're throwing that [player name]!
